The '''grantaloupe''' was a four-legged creature that lived on [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]] and was often [[Hunting/Legends|hunted]] and eaten by the local [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiees]].

{{Creature-stub}}
